name: Kewl Tune New Era
desc:
2 Level 5 Tuner monsters
For a Synchro Summon, you can treat this card as Level 5.
Your opponent cannot Tribute Tuner monsters you control.
During the Main Phase or your opponent’s Battle Phase (Quick Effect): You can detach 1 material from this card; increase the Levels of all monsters your opponent currently controls by 1, also you can Special Summon 1 Tuner monster from your GY, then immediately after this effect resolves, Synchro Summon 1 Synchro Monster using monsters you control, including that monster.
You can only use this effect of "Kewl Tune New Era" once per turn.
